phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Torre Real is
phrases.text_local: Podes dizer-me onde fica a Torre Real?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih REEAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The royal tower sits centrally, accessible via the primary ascent.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre Real.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih REEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Torre Real.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Torre Real.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih REEAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre Real.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o restaurante O Cantinho do João?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih AW kahnng-TEE-nyoo DOO ZHOOOWN?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um funcionário da loja, eles podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or a shop employee, they can help.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or a shop employee, they can help.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um funcionário da loja, eles podem ajudar.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um restaurante local aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih loo-KAHL uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou a um funcionário da loja, eles podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the ticket office or a store employee, they can help.

responses.english: You can ask at the ticket office or a store employee, they can help.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou a um funcionário da loja, eles podem ajudar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Torre do Sol
phrases.text_local: Como chegar à Torre do Sol?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH TAW-rih DOO SAWL?
phrases.cultural_note: Sun-facing towers are located on the eastern ridge path.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Sol.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO SAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Torre do Sol.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Torre do Sol.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO SAWL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cisterna Medieval is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a Cisterna Medieval?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh meh-deeih-VAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Water reservoirs are typically located in lower courtyard areas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Cisterna Medieval.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh meh-deeih-VAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Cisterna Medieval.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Cisterna Medieval.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh meh-deeih-VAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Cisterna Medieval.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Torre da Lua is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre da Lua?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DUH LOOUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic towers are positioned along the highest ridge for visibility.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or a tour guide.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or a tour guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Porta da Traição
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Porta da Traição?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH treye-SOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Castle navigation relies on following marked stone paths and wall remnants.

likely_response.local: Siga pelas placas para a Porta da Traição.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh PEH-luhsh PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH treye-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Porta da Traição.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Porta da Traição.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh PEH-luhsh PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH treye-SOWN.
responses.local: Siga pelas placas para a Porta da Traição.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Cisterna Medieval. Se precisar de mais ajuda, dirija-se à bilheteira ou consulte um guia turístico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh meh-deeih-VAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW koong-SOOW-tih OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Cisterna Medieval. If you need further assistance, go to the ticket booth or consult a tour guide.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Cisterna Medieval. If you need further assistance, go to the ticket booth or consult a tour guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seesh-TEH-ruh-nuh meh-deeih-VAHL. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW koong-SOOW-tih OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Cisterna Medieval. Se precisar de mais ajuda, dirija-se à bilheteira ou consulte um guia turístico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Torre Real is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica a Torre Real?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih REEAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Torre Real is one of the main towers at the Moorish Castle, often visible from the entrance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas, subindo a colina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh, soo-BEEN-doo AH koo-LEE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs, up the hill.

responses.english: Follow the signs, up the hill.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh, soo-BEEN-doo AH koo-LEE-nuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas, subindo a colina.
